category_sources: source_facts.description says fio is an I/O benchmark and stress test; official fio documentation describes it as the Flexible I/O tester and covers job files, command-line options, and I/O workloads.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and official documentation use fio.
docs_sources: Official fio Read the Docs site provides dedicated documentation; official GitHub HOWTO is maintained in the project repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/axboe/fio; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies I/O benchmark and stress testing; official fio docs cover I/O workloads, command-line options, and job file parameters.
